name: Survivor's Rhythm
short_description: In Survivor’s Rhythm, rhythm is the key to survival! This fast-paced roguelike hack-and-slash throws you into endless monster waves. Dodge, attack, and grow stronger in an intense 30-minute battle. Defeat the final Boss and claim victory!
detailed_description:
Story Background

In a world consumed by monstrous tides, time becomes your greatest enemy. As the last survivor, you must fight through endless hordes of creatures, seeking a way to break free. Every battle is a symphony of survival, and you must follow the rhythm of destruction, evolve continuously, and face your ultimate destiny!

Gameplay Overview

  • Freely Customize Your Build: Choose 6 active skills and 6 passive skills per run to create your ultimate combat strategy!

  • Experience-Based Growth: Defeat monsters to gain experience. With each level-up, you can unlock new skills or enhance existing ones, growing stronger as the battle progresses!

  • Gold & Permanent Upgrades: Collect gold during gameplay and use it to upgrade passive skills outside the game, making you even stronger in future battles!

  • Achievement Unlock System: Complete specific achievements to unlock new characters and skills, expanding your combat possibilities!

Game Highlights

  • Diverse Skill Builds & Stunning Effects: Each attack delivers a thrilling visual and impact experience, making every battle more immersive!

  • Scaling Monster Waves & Increasing Challenge: Enemy numbers grow over time, ramping up from sparse encounters to overwhelming survival trials. The battle rhythm intensifies, keeping you engaged!

  • Distinctive Maps & Tactical Terrain: Each map features unique visual styles and environmental obstacles that influence your combat strategy!

supported_languages: English, German, Russian, Japanese, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Vietnamese, Korean
